summary: Tested BRS Reminder App backend (14 pytest cases, all passing) and Expo/React Native frontend on mobile viewport (390x844). All core flows work end-to-end: login (valid + invalid), home with greeting/cards/badge, clients search, new-entry validation + save, client detail, edit prefill, reminders screen, navigation, and logout. Backend correctly excludes _id, validates date range for reminders (today + 2 days), supports case-insensitive search across name/order_number/order_details.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated on web — switch shadows.card to boxShadow for cleaner web logs (cosmetic only, native unaffected).
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' from RN Web.

react_native_issues.issue: Alert.alert used with multi-button confirm for delete. On react-native-web the multi-button form is not supported — only the title/message is shown via window.alert and the destructive onPress never fires, so deleting from the web preview is effectively a no-op. It works correctly in Expo Go / native. Recommended: use a custom confirm Modal or window.confirm shim for web parity. Same pattern is acceptable for non-destructive Alert.alert info messages in login/new-entry.

action_items: Optional: replace Alert.alert delete confirm in app/client/[id].tsx with a custom Modal so delete works in web preview (native already works).
Optional: align package versions flagged by `expo doctor` (@react-native-async-storage/async-storage, @react-native-community/datetimepicker, expo-font, react-native-svg) to silence warnings.
Optional: replace deprecated `shadow*` style props with `boxShadow` in src/theme.ts shadows.card.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single-file ~190 lines — clean and within size limits.
All endpoints correctly project out `_id` from MongoDB results.
Pydantic validation present on all POST/PUT bodies; 401 / 404 / 400 used appropriately.
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL — no hardcoded URLs.
All interactive elements have testID; mobile touch targets are 44x44+.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all flows work; web-only Alert.alert delete-confirm limitation noted)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed clients and clean up via DELETE in the same run. The 5 demo BRS clients pre-seeded by the dev are untouched. One UI-created client (TEST_UI_Client) was cleaned up via API after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL: https://simple-layout-3.preview.emergentagent.com (from frontend/.env EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL). Seeded users: BRS/1001, ADMIN/9999. 5 demo BRS clients exist. Reminder window is today + 2 days inclusive. testIDs documented in original review request. To rerun backend tests: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_brs_api.py -v`. The web-preview Alert.alert delete limitation means automated UI delete tests should call DELETE via API directly or be skipped.
rca_of_issue: No app-side bugs. The only frontend-on-web behavior worth noting is that react-native-web maps Alert.alert to window.alert, dropping multi-button options — so the destructive Delete callback doesn't run in browser. On a real device (Expo Go / native), the confirmation is a real Alert with Cancel/Delete buttons and works as intended.
